description_long: This coatrack is constructed from what appears to be natural, unfinished wood, with a rustic and organic design. The main horizontal bar is supported by two Y-shaped vertical branches, giving it a sturdy yet visually interesting structure. The wood surface is textured, showing the natural grain and knots, and the ends of the branches are cut flat. There are no visible metal or plastic components, and the overall appearance is minimalist, with no decorative embellishments. The coatrack is likely intended to be wall-mounted, as the back is flat and the structure is not stable enough for freestanding use. Its design is functional, with the Y-branches serving as hooks for hanging coats or bags.
description: A rustic, natural wood coatrack with a horizontal bar supported by two Y-shaped branches, featuring a textured, unfinished surface and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the coatrack, with both Y-shaped branches and the horizontal bar clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the coatrack and the thickness of the horizontal bar.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the Y-shaped branches and horizontal bar, but with less detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the depth of the horizontal bar.
